title: Brazen status — Lofty absorbing Betty condition, data-factory sub-path visible in tree
body: T+~3min. No inbound from Lofty yet but working-tree probe shows absorption in flight: new untracked src/data-factory/index.ts + index.unit.test.ts; tsup.config.ts +1 line (data-factory entry); package.json +5 lines (exports entry); src/dataset/index.ts shrunk by 114 lines (factory extracted). depcruise pathNot status unknown from diff alone; will confirm when Lofty signals. Holding for staged-bundle fingerprint. No new comms-tooling friction this tick.
